caption: A large group of men and women are seated in an auditorium or assembly hall with tiered wooden seating and green cushioned chairs. The majority of the people are men wearing traditional white or light-colored Indian attire, such as kurtas, with some wearing saffron-colored scarves or waistcoats. A few women are visible, wearing colorful saris. The individuals are seated closely together, facing forward, and appear to be listening or observing a proceeding. Across the sequence of frames, the scene remains largely static with very little movement. Some individuals shift slightly in their seats or change their posture, but there are no significant interactions, gestures, or changes in the environment. No on-screen text, logos, or electronic equipment are visible, and the lighting remains consistent throughout the short duration of the clip.
